title: Human Approval Checkpoint
description: APPR-01 human approval record. Produced by the ship gate (decision=pending) and resolved by a human (decision=approved|rejected|waived). x-binding: binding — a pending or rejected decision blocks ship (D-08).

approvalId.description: Unique identifier for the approval request (e.g. ship-09).

phase.description: Workflow phase the approval is scoped to.

artifactPath.description: Repo-relative path to the artifact under approval (e.g. .planning/governance/gates/09-ship.json).

requestedBy.description: The hook that created the pending request (e.g. aidlc-governance-ship).

requestedAt.description: ISO-8601 strict timestamp (TD-01 shape). When the pending request was created.

decision.description: The approval decision. pending = awaiting human resolution; approved|rejected|waived are the human outcomes. Distinct from GateResult.status (pass|fail|waived).

decidedBy.description: Human approver identity. Optional while decision=pending (D-07); required and non-empty once decided.

decidedAt.description: ISO-8601 strict timestamp (TD-01 shape). When the decision was resolved.

rationale.description: Optional human-authored rationale for the decision.
